subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached the presence of the Wronged One, and We have revealed for thee that which shall gladden the eyes. Grieve not over this world [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر کتابک لدی المظلوم و انزلنا لک ما تقر به العیون لاتحزن عن الدنیا و
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
